Name: File System - Copy File
Description: Copies a file in the file system.

Parameters.Name: sourcePath
Parameters.Label: File source path
Parameters.HelpText: The full path of the file you wish to copy.

Parameters.Name: destinationPath
Parameters.Label: File destionation path
Parameters.HelpText: The full path for the destination of the file. You can rename the file by giving it a new name in the path. If the file already exists at the destination it is overwritten.
